_doc: Failing DashboardSnapshotBot job. Info = Win32Exception (6) 'The handle is invalid' at System.Drawing.Graphics.CopyFromScreen — a screen-capture activity with no live desktop surface. The robot user runs unattended with LoginToConsole=false (see users get), so there is no interactive session to capture. The fix is to give the robot a live session (Login to Console), not to change the workflow logic.

Data.Info:
System.ComponentModel.Win32Exception (6): The handle is invalid.
   at System.Drawing.Graphics.CopyFromScreen(Int32 sourceX, Int32 sourceY, Int32 destinationX, Int32 destinationY, Size blockRegionSize, CopyPixelOperation copyPixelOperation)
